.backlink-pane.background: rgb(245, 245, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-node-content.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(250, 250, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.graph-controls.background: rgb(245, 245, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.markdown-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-preview-view hr.border-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 159, 184), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) 1 / 1 / 0 stretch

.markdown-preview-view hr::after.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.markdown-preview-view hr::after.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.metadata-container.background: color(srgb 0.903137 0.940549 0.964863) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: oklch(0.64598 0.113561 214.067 / 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.search-input-container.global-search-in.background: rgb(250, 250, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.search-result-file-matched-text.background: rgba(196, 17, 155, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: color(srgb 0.84549 0.920314 0.949333) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tree-item-children.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 245, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-tab-header-container.background: rgb(245, 245, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(250, 250, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(245, 245, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(245, 245, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 245, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(0, 159, 184) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(250, 250, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].background: color(srgb 0.903137 0.940549 0.964863) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(10, 10, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(10, 10, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid).background: rgb(10, 10, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(250, 250, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(250, 250, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
